articles.title: BI sounds alarm on trafficking Filipinos as soldiers
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Bureau of Immigration (BI) has expressed concern over the “alarming trend” of trafficking Filipinos to work as soldiers abroad as it recently intercepted six victims in different airports in the country. articles.title: Pathetic media outraged by Trump's attending White House Correspondents' Dinner
articles.description: Since 1921, the annual black-tie dinner has gathered members of the media, top politicos, and even Hollywood stars. In 1924 Calvin Coolidge launched what would become the tradition of the president speaking at the event. In a nod to the awkward social skills so prevalent among journalists, the event is known in DC as "the nerd prom."
